title: gonolobus niger
intro: Gonolobus niger, also known as the black vine or black gourd, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, helping to relieve pain and reduce muscle spasms. The health benefits of Gonolobus niger include its ability to alleviate menstrual cramps, lower blood pressure, and reduce stress levels, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health issues. In herbal preparations, Gonolobus niger is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and can also be applied topically as a poultice or infused oil to enhance its medicinal properties.
